author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Include a USB servo-controller option**

For a no-controller six-servo arm, making PCA9685 the only hardware path misses a high-leverage alternative that directly fits the Claude/Python workflow: Pololu Micro/Mini Maestro controllers expose native USB/TTL serial, per-channel speed/acceleration, and scripting for 6+ servos ([product](https://www.pololu.com/product/1350), [serial commands](https://www.pololu.com/docs/0J40/5.e)). Even if the Arduino path remains the default, mentioning Maestro as an option prevents the build slice from overlooking the simpler host-driven controller route.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
